creator: jrm@freebsd.org
text: The original developer has abandoned parcellite and since his departure I've been unable to unbreak deskutils/parcellite on FreeBSD.  I created a port for a fork of parcellite, deskutils/clipit and suggest users of parcellite switch to clipit.  Perhaps removal of deskutils/parcellite is the best course of action, unless of course a new maintainer with a better handle on autoconf tools is found.
